---
title: "Nadia Haddadnia"
sortby: "2"
subtitle: "MSc Student"
image: nadia.png
started: "Apr 2026"
interests: "Computational microscopy · Micro/nano characterization · Materials simulation"
toc: false
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:nadia.haddadnia@fau.de

---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../people.html">People</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active">MSc Students</li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">{{< meta title >}}</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

:::{#person-profile}
:::

## Research Interests

- Computational microscopy and data analysis
- Micro/nano characterization
- Materials simulation for functional materials
 

## Work Experience

- **Khoramdasht Rees Industrial Group** · Quality Control Laboratory Assistant · 2024 – 2025

## Research Experience

- **Tehran University of Medical Sciences (TUMS)** · Research Intern · 2022 – 2024
  - Analyzed rs-fMRI data to study relationships with biomarker signatures across the Alzheimer's disease spectrum.
- **Amirkabir University of Technology** · Undergraduate Researcher · 2022 – 2023
  - Developed a computational and statistical framework for neuro-biomarker analysis in neurodegenerative diseases.
